title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Faculty of Business and Administrative Sciences

Announcements

29
						May

2025

Dear Students,

Applications for the 2024 - 2025 Spring Semester Final Make-up
Exam will be done by

. To
apply for the make-up exam students must fill in the "Make-up Exam
Application Letter" available on the website and submit to the Faculty
Secretariat in person.

Click to see Make-up Exam Application Letter.

The exams of the students whose final make-up exam applications are accepted will be held

. The students who are eligible to take make-up exam will be informed by e-mail, hence it is vital to check your e-mail boxes.

Good luck

en

tr
